text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, it's just...There are so few clouds in the sky
today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, could we continue our meeting tonight?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without giving me a second to respond, Silence
Suzuka rushes out the door.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was looking up at the sky while I was running,
and when the sun started going down...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The whole sky turned a deep red. Then, all of a
sudden, I could see the stars and the moon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We pick up our meeting where we left off, though
Silence Suzuka seems to be in a much better
mood.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It got cloudy as soon as I started running. I
couldn't see the sun at all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It was so much prettier when I stepped out. If only
I had left earlier...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear Silence Suzuka's feeling down, so I
decide to postpone the remainder of our meeting
until tomorrow.
